Uses of Package
org.tquadrat.foundation.xml.parse

Packages that use org.tquadrat.foundation.xml.parse
Package
Description
org.tquadrat.foundation.xml.parse
Tools and helper classes for XML parsing.
org.tquadrat.foundation.xml.parse.spi
Some helper classes for the XML parse stuff.
  • Classes in org.tquadrat.foundation.xml.parse used by org.tquadrat.foundation.xml.parse
    Class
    Description
    AdvancedContentHandler.Element
    This class serves a container for the name, the data and the attributes of an XML element.
    AdvancedContentHandler.HandlerMethod
    The functional interface describing a method that processes an XML element.
    Attribute
    An attribute.
    Attribute.Type
    The attribute types.
    DefaultErrorHandler
    This implementation for a XML Error handler will write the error messages to System.err.
    NullErrorHandler
    This implementation for a XML Error handler swallows the error messages.
    XMLParseEventHandler
    The interface for an implementation of a parse event handler to be used with StAX parsing of XML files.

    This is a functional interface whose functional method is XMLParseEventHandler.process(XMLEventReader, XMLEvent, Object, HandlerProvider).
  • Classes in org.tquadrat.foundation.xml.parse used by org.tquadrat.foundation.xml.parse.spi
    Class
    Description
    XMLParseEventHandler
    The interface for an implementation of a parse event handler to be used with StAX parsing of XML files.

    This is a functional interface whose functional method is XMLParseEventHandler.process(XMLEventReader, XMLEvent, Object, HandlerProvider).
